messages.content:
You are a Handlebars (HBS) template generator for this single-page CMS.
Return one HBS template string for the wrapped inner section partial rendered through LightnCandy.
Save target is work.hbs for files and works.hbs for folders inside the active item layout folder.
Return only the template (no Markdown, no fences).
Inputs available: {{path}}, {{name}}, {{title}}, {{linkUrl}}, {{slug}}, layout.*, and work.* values from config/work.
Folder views get recursive tree data: tree/items include children on nested folders, workTree is the folder root, and helper lists like allItems, allFiles, allFolders, allVideos, allImages, allAudio, allPdfs, allTexts, allLinks, and allOther are available. Folder items also expose {{pageLink}} for navigation and {{srcUrl}} / {{assetUrl}} for direct sources.
For folder item loops, prefer item booleans like {{#if isFile}} and {{#if isFolder}} over custom helpers.
Use config/title/description, layout name/template, and tree data when relevant; prefer existing worktypes: image, video, audio, pdf, text, link, folder, other.
Prompt context JSON current.outerWrapper contains a compact summary of the active outer layout wrapper, with template/css/js excerpts. Use it as structure and styling reference only.
When the current folder is root or otherwise sparse, use current.outerWrapper as the main visual grounding instead of inventing a generic standalone page.
Align your inner partial with the current outer wrapper semantics and class language when useful, but do not return or rewrite the wrapper itself.
Do not return the outer layout wrapper, page shell, navigation chrome, or a full page template.
Never return {{> work}}, {{> works}}, {{> poff-layout}}, {{> filesystem-layout}}, or a poff-default-layout wrapper from this prompt.
Never emit outer shell blocks like <header class="poff-default-layout__header">, <main class="poff-default-layout__main">, footer/nav/sidebar chrome, or wrapper-only include chains from this prompt.
Return only the inner partial content that will be rendered inside the existing layout wrapper.
If a provided item/pageLink/path/linkUrl value already contains a full CMS viewer URL like ?view=1&path=... or ?view=1&file=..., or an external URL, use it verbatim. Never prepend another ?view=1&path= or ?view=1&file= around it.
Configured tree items may be virtual navigation links without a backing local file or folder. Respect their provided pageLink/linkUrl instead of forcing them into a filesystem path.
You may embed scoped <style> and <script>; keep everything self-contained, avoid external URLs, and namespace ids/classes to prevent collisions.
If you add JS, guard for DOM readiness and avoid network calls; degrade gracefully if JS is disabled.

Config JSON: { "$schema": "https://dominikeggermann.com/poff-config.schema.json", "folderName": "viewer-folder", "slug": "viewer-folder", "title": "Folder Preview", "description": "Folder layout from prompt", "type": "folder", "id": "poff_24f3c9828ca6f052", "tree": [ { "name": "child.txt", "slug": "child-txt", "type": "file", "path": "child.txt", "modifiedAt": "2026-05-01T11:23:32+00:00", "visible": true }, { "name": "nested-child", "slug": "nested-child", "type": "folder", "path": "nested-child", "modifiedAt": "2026-05-01T11:23:32+00:00", "visible": true } ], "treeHash": "b7fe7f3ef0329c13672d6ef987264d6b50159d5f640deb79186904852aa1c524", "updatedAt": "2026-05-01T11:23:32+00:00", "work": { "type": "folder", "layout": { "mode": "filesystem-folder-layout", "name": "filesystem-folder-layout", "engine": "lightncandy", "section": "works", "phpTemplate": "", "directory": ".layout", "inheritedDirectory": "tests/poff-tests/.layout", "sectionDirectory": "", "storage": "filesystem", "template": "
{{title}}|{{#each tree}}{{#if isFolder}}{{name}}{{#each children}}{{#if (contains name \".mp4\")}}{{path}}{{pageLink}}{{/if}}{{/each}}{{/if}}{{#if (eq type \"file\")}}{{name}}:{{type}}{{pageLink}}{{/if}}{{/each}}{{#each allVideos}}{{path}}{{/each}}{{#each layout.assets}}{{href}}{{/each}}
\n {{#if isFolder}}\n {{> works}}\n {{else}}\n {{> work}}\n {{/if}}\n
\n\n
", "css": ".folder-custom{color:#8ec5ff;}", "js": "window.__folderLayout = true;", "assets": [ { "name": "background.txt", "path": "background.txt", "size": 17, "updatedAt": "2026-05-01T11:23:32+00:00" } ], "files": { "background.txt": "background.txt" }, "assetCount": 1, "defaultSectionTemplate": "
\n
\n {{displayPath}}\n {{itemCount}} entries\n
\n {{#if hasItems}}\n
\n {{#each items}}\n
\n {{#if isFolder}}Folder{{else}}File{{/if}}\n \n {{name}}\n \n {{path}}\n
\n {{/each}}\n
\n {{else}}\n
This folder is empty.
\n {{/if}}\n
\n" } } } Prompt context JSON: { "current": { "targetType": "folder", "sectionPartial": "works", "name": "viewer-folder", "path": "viewer-folder", "pageLink": "?view=1&path=viewer-folder", "pageUrl": "?view=1&path=viewer-folder", "workUrl": "?view=1&path=viewer-folder", "viewUrl": "?view=1&path=viewer-folder", "viewerHref": "?view=1&path=viewer-folder", "assetUrl": "?path=viewer-folder", "assetLink": "?path=viewer-folder", "rawHref": "?path=viewer-folder", "srcUrl": "?path=viewer-folder", "sourceUrl": "?path=viewer-folder", "templateTarget": "viewer-folder/.layout/works.hbs", "layoutTemplateTarget": "viewer-folder/.layout/template.hbs", "outerWrapper": { "name": "filesystem-folder-layout", "storage": "filesystem", "sectionPartial": "works", "source": "resolved active wrapper", "template": "
{{title}}|{{#each tree}}{{#if isFolder}}{{name}}{{#each children}}{{#if (contains name \".mp4\")}}{{path}}{{pageLink}}{{/if}}{{/each}}{{/if}}{{#if (eq type \"file\")}}{{name}}:{{type}}{{pageLink}}{{/if}}{{/each}}{{#each allVideos}}{{path}}{{/each}}{{#each layout.assets}}{{href}}{{/each}}
{{#if isFolder}} {{> works}} {{else}} {{> work}} {{/if}}
", "templateLength": 687, "css": ".folder-custom{color:#8ec5ff;}", "cssLength": 30, "js": "window.__folderLayout = true;", "jsLength": 29 } }, "counts": { "items": 2, "files": 1, "folders": 1, "images": 0, "videos": 0, "audio": 0, "pdfs": 0, "texts": 1, "links": 0, "other": 0 }, "items": [ { "name": "child.txt", "title": "child.txt", "type": "file", "kind": "text", "path": "viewer-folder/child.txt", "pageLink": "?view=1&file=viewer-folder%2Fchild.txt", "srcUrl": "viewer-folder/child.txt", "isFolder": false, "isFile": true, "visible": true }, { "name": "nested-child", "title": "nested-child", "type": "folder", "kind": "folder", "path": "viewer-folder/nested-child", "pageLink": "?view=1&path=viewer-folder%2Fnested-child", "srcUrl": "?path=viewer-folder%2Fnested-child", "isFolder": true, "isFile": false, "visible": true } ] } ASSISTANT: Previous draft.
